question: Among the countries who uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology, how many are in the Middle East & North Africa? Name the country with the highest CO2 emissions from solid fuel consumption in kiloton.
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CountryCode) FROM indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Region = 'Middle East & North Africa' AND T2.SystemOfNationalAccounts = 'Country uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology.' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions FROM solid fuel consumption (kt)' UNION SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T1.CountryName FROM indicators AS T1 INNER JOIN country AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T2.Region = 'Middle East & North Africa' AND T2.SystemOfNationalAccounts = 'Country uses the 1968 System of National Accounts methodology.' AND T1.IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions FROM solid fuel consumption (kt)' GROUP BY T1.CountryName ORDER BY SUM(T1.value) DESC LIMIT 1 )
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.CountryCode) FROM Country AS T1 INNER JOIN Indicators AS T2 ON T1.CountryCode = T2.CountryCode WHERE T1.SystemOfNationalAccounts = '1968 System of National Accounts methodology' AND T1.Region = 'Middle East & North Africa' UNION SELECT T1.CountryName FROM Indicators AS T2 INNER JOIN Country AS T1 ON T2.CountryCode = T1.CountryCode WHERE T2.IndicatorName = 'CO2 emissions from solid fuel consumption (kt)' ORDER BY T2.Value DESC LIMIT 1

question: Find organizations with declining MRR month-over-month
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT s1.organization_id FROM subscriptions s1 JOIN subscriptions s2 ON s1.organization_id = s2.organization_id WHERE s1.start_date > s2.start_date AND s1.monthly_recurring_revenue < s2.monthly_recurring_revenue ORDER BY s1.organization_id
pred_sql: SELECT o.organization_id, o.organization_name, MAX(s1.monthly_recurring_revenue) AS prev_mrr, MAX(s2.monthly_recurring_revenue) AS curr_mrr FROM organizations o JOIN subscriptions s1 ON o.organization_id = s1.organization_id JOIN subscriptions s2 ON o.organization_id = s2.organization_id AND strftime('%Y-%m', s2.start_date) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-1 month')) WHERE s1.status = 'active' AND s2.status = 'active' GROUP BY o.organization_id, o.organization_name HAVING MAX(s2.monthly_recurring_revenue) < MAX(s1.monthly_recurring_revenue)

question: Find products with above-average sales velocity
gold_sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.category, COUNT(oi.order_item_id) * 1.0 / (julianday('now') - julianday(p.created_at)) as velocity FROM products p LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.category HAVING velocity > (SELECT AVG(cnt * 1.0 / (julianday('now') - julianday(p2.created_at))) FROM products p2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT product_id, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM order_items GROUP BY product_id) oi2 ON p2.product_id = oi2.product_id) ORDER BY p.product_id

question: Which recipe is more beneficial in wound healing, "Raspberry Chiffon Pie" or "Fresh Apricot Bavarian"?
